TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_ka_rawrawan_no_madawdaw_a_demak, title = O_ka_rawrawan_no_madawdaw_a_demak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_ka_rawrawan_no_madawdaw_a_demak} }

S.FORM: == O ka rawrawan no madawdaw a demak == Yo mikowan ko Dipong to taywan i, litemohen no Pangcah ko sa'ayaway a tangasa i pasawali. Tadanga'ayay ko tamdaw noya niyaro', masinanotay ko pinangan saan ko pitapal noya Dipong, saka ano ira ko karetengay a tayal tatayalen i ca ka eca mitahidang to finacadan no Pangcah a pakatayal. Patinako han; o pipalalan to lalan no cilamalay ato no tosiya, misanga to kayakay, mipongkang, mikarkar to minato, no sofitay a demak, patireng to loma', kahirahira no demak, Saka patangic sa'an mitahidang to kapah no niyalo a misakuli, Saka itilasa'an ipapotal no niyaro' ko kapah a matayal, ma'ihiw toku demak no niyaro' Awa'ay toko mimawmahay, Itira a malakuli miming ko lifun, Samisisama'anen lintay sako haling, Ikaka sato ko pikali'ang no dipong to misakuli'ay a kapah, Saka matumes toko langiwngiw no falocu, Masadak toko micu'a'angay a demak. 1910-2-25 Toya a romi'ad ira'ay ko tata'angay a kayki no dipung, Sama'anen a mifu'ot koya pangcah sa'an ko kayki nangra, Su'elin to papisanga'en nangra ko kapah, to kakahaday a katayalan, Saka pifu'ot nangra to misakuli'ay a yincumin, Tahila pilifunan masa'upo ko tomuk, Itila pisili'an iloma no tomuk, Mikayki ko tomuk, 1911-5 Mahelek toko demak no ilising haw i, Pasuwalen no tomuk ko kalo niyaro' O hafay namo'i akaka patayla'en i suku a minaang, Oya caka pinangan i suko a demak, Mafana toko dipung, Mitahidan to madawdaw, turik, a tomuk malicay to, O hafay namo manaca ko na'angen i suko, Safaw lima a romi'ad kalikien a patayni i suku a mina'ang, Oya dipung taylasa'an i falangaw mitahidang to tomuk ci Kolas-Mahengheng a mikaykic to lawlaw no niyaro'. Mitengil to suwal ko tomuk, 1911-7-24 Toya romi'ad i turik a kingcasaw Fucinyinselang misa'upo to tomuk, Kapu'i hanira ko tomuk macedeng kamu a misanga to lalan, Ya matuka'ay kamu, Pakatengil sako tomuk ketersa'an kilumot hanra a mi'odut, Taylasa'i papotar kilumot a miseti koya dipung, Tahila kapatayan noya kingcas, Saka mapakohac toko "Madawdaw a demak" . Pakatengil sako tomuk no madawdaw ci likaro, Tayla sa'an ipitilidan patay hannira ko singsi, Misa'upu to finawlan, O madawdaw, O cirarokohay O kaheciday, O pa'ong ong, O torik a paniyaro'an, Tolo su'ot ko kapah a misasi'ayaw to dipung, Itira i pisili'an kanapuka a alo' misa'upo, Satuemanan sa'an milimek olasaka malitemuh no dipung, Lawlawsa'an ira toko makowangay, Ira ko maduka'ay, Ira ko mapatayay, hatila'ay koya demak, Satapang to amilimek ko fafahiyan wawa ato mato'asay tayla i lotok, Toya lilisan no riyal malikutay tono dipung, Awa'ay to ko pakayla'an no finawlan, 1911-8-10 Miliyaw ho mitahidang ci Kolas-Mahenghengan, Amikaykic tosa pipasela'an, Kolas-Mahengheng matu'asayto ci adada'ay, Olasaka adidi han nira mikaykic, O torik madawdaw a niyaro'. Opulong a kuwan pafeli han toko dipung, Ta nonini'an a demak haw i, Spat polo ira falo aromi'ad ko lawlaw no Madawdaw,
S.PHON: == o~u ka rawrawan no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak == jo~u miko~uwan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan i, ɾitəmo~uħən no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u saʡajawaj a taŋasa i pasawaɾi. taɬ~ɮaŋaʡajaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~uja nijaro~uʡ, masinano~utaj ko~u pinaŋan saan ko~u pitapaɾ no~uja ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka ano~u ira ko~u karətəŋaj a tajaɾ tatajaɾən i ʦa ka əʦa mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u paŋʦaħ a pakatajaɾ. patinako~u ħan; o~u pipaɾaɾan to~u ɾaɾan no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj ato~u no~u to~usija, misaŋa to~u kajakaj, mipo~uŋkaŋ, mikarkar to~u minato~u, no~u so~ufitaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, patirəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ, kaħiraħira no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, saka pataŋiʦ saʡan mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kapaħ no~u nijaɾo~u a misako~u~uɾi, saka itiɾasaʡan ipapo~utaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~u kapaħ a matajaɾ, maʡiħiw to~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~uʡ awaʡaj to~uko~u mimawmaħaj, itira a maɾako~u~uɾi mimiŋ ko~u ɾifo~u~un, samisisamaʡanən ɾintaj sako~u ħaɾiŋ, ikaka sato~u ko~u pikaɾiʡaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u misako~u~uɾiʡaj a kapaħ, saka mato~u~uməs to~uko~u ɾaŋiwŋiw no~u faɾo~uʦo~u~u, masaɬ~ɮak to~uko~u miʦo~u~uʡaʡaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ****-*-** to~uja a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ iraʡaj ko~u tataʡaŋaj a kajki no~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, samaʡanən a mifo~u~uʡo~ut ko~uja paŋʦaħ saʡan ko~u kajki naŋra, so~u~uʡəɾin to~u papisaŋaʡən naŋra ko~u kapaħ, to~u kakaħaɬ~ɮaj a katajaɾan, saka pifo~u~uʡo~ut naŋra to~u misako~u~uɾiʡaj a jinʦo~u~umin, taħiɾa piɾifo~u~unan masaʡo~u~upo~u ko~u to~umo~u~uk, itiɾa pisiɾiʡan iɾo~uma no~u to~umo~u~uk, mikajki ko~u to~umo~u~uk, ****-* maħəɾək to~uko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u iɾisiŋ ħaw i, paso~u~uwaɾən no~u to~umo~u~uk ko~u kaɾo~u nijaro~uʡ o~u ħafaj namo~uʡi akaka patajɾaʡən i so~u~uko~u~u a minaaŋ, o~uja ʦaka pinaŋan i so~u~uko~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, mafana to~uko~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, mitaħiɬ~ɮan to~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, to~u~urik, a to~umo~u~uk maɾiʦaj to~u, o~u ħafaj namo~u manaʦa ko~u naʡaŋən i so~u~uko~u, safaw ɾima a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kaɾikiən a patajni i so~u~uko~u~u a minaʡaŋ, o~uja ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ tajɾasaʡan i faɾaŋaw mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u to~umo~u~uk ʦi ko~uɾas-maħəŋħəŋ a mikajkiʦ to~u ɾawɾaw no~u nijaro~uʡ. mitəŋiɾ to~u so~u~uwaɾ ko~u to~umo~u~uk, ****-*-** to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i to~u~urik a kiŋʦasaw fo~u~uʦinjinsəɾaŋ misaʡo~u~upo~u to~u to~umo~u~uk, kapo~u~uʡi ħanira ko~u to~umo~u~uk maʦəɬ~ɮəŋ kamo~u~u a misaŋa to~u ɾaɾan, ja mato~u~ukaʡaj kamo~u~u, pakatəŋiɾ sako~u to~umo~u~uk kətərsaʡan kiɾo~u~umo~ut ħanra a miʡo~uɬ~ɮo~u~ut, tajɾasaʡi papo~utar kiɾo~u~umo~ut a misəti ko~uja ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, taħiɾa kapatajan no~uja kiŋʦas, saka mapako~uħaʦ to~uko~u "maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak" . pakatəŋiɾ sako~u to~umo~u~uk no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ʦi ɾikaro~u, tajɾa saʡan ipitiɾiɬ~ɮan pataj ħannira ko~u siŋsi, misaʡo~u~upo~u~u to~u finawɾan, o~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, o~u ʦiraro~uko~uħaj o~u kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj, o~u paʡo~uŋ o~uŋ, o~u to~urik a panijaro~uʡan, to~uɾo~u so~u~uʡo~ut ko~u kapaħ a misasiʡajaw to~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, itira i pisiɾiʡan kanapo~u~uka a aɾo~uʡ misaʡo~u~upo~u, sato~u~uəmanan saʡan miɾimək o~uɾasaka maɾitəmo~u~uħ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, ɾawɾawsaʡan ira to~uko~u mako~uwaŋaj, ira ko~u maɬ~ɮo~u~ukaʡaj, ira ko~u mapatajaj, ħatiɾaʡaj ko~uja ɬ~ɮəmak, satapaŋ to~u amiɾimək ko~u fafaħijan wawa ato~u mato~uʡasaj tajɾa i ɾo~uto~uk, to~uja ɾiɾisan no~u rijaɾ maɾiko~u~utaj to~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, awaʡaj to~u ko~u pakajɾaʡan no~u finawɾan, ****-*-** miɾijaw ħo~u mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi ko~uɾas-maħəŋħəŋan, amikajkiʦ to~usa pipasəɾaʡan, ko~uɾas-maħəŋħəŋ mato~u~uʡasajto~u ʦi aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡaj, o~uɾasaka aɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi ħan nira mikajkiʦ, o~u to~urik maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a nijaro~uʡ. o~upo~u~uɾo~uŋ a ko~u~uwan pafəɾi ħan to~uko~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, ta no~uniniʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak ħaw i, spat po~uɾo~u ira faɾo~u aro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾawɾaw no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw,
S.FORM: == O ka rawrawan no madawdaw a demak == Yo mikowan ko Dipong to taywan i, litemohen no Pangcah ko sa'ayaway a tangasa i pasawali. Tadanga'ayay ko tamdaw noya niyaro', masinanotay ko pinangan saan ko pitapal noya Dipong, saka ano ira ko karetengay a tayal tatayalen i ca ka eca mitahidang to finacadan no Pangcah a pakatayal. Patinako han; o pipalalan to lalan no cilamalay ato no tosiya, misanga to kayakay, mipongkang, mikarkar to minato, no sofitay a demak, patireng to loma', kahirahira no demak, Saka patangic sa'an mitahidang to kapah no niyalo a misakuli, Saka itilasa'an ipapotal no niyaro' ko kapah a matayal, ma'ihiw toku demak no niyaro' Awa'ay toko mimawmahay, Itira a malakuli miming ko lifun, Samisisama'anen lintay sako haling, Ikaka sato ko pikali'ang no dipong to misakuli'ay a kapah, Saka matumes toko langiwngiw no falocu, Masadak toko micu'a'angay a demak. 1910-2-25 Toya a romi'ad ira'ay ko tata'angay a kayki no dipung, Sama'anen a mifu'ot koya pangcah sa'an ko kayki nangra, Su'elin to papisanga'en nangra ko kapah, to kakahaday a katayalan, Saka pifu'ot nangra to misakuli'ay a yincumin, Tahila pilifunan masa'upo ko tomuk, Itila pisili'an iloma no tomuk, Mikayki ko tomuk, 1911-5 Mahelek toko demak no ilising haw i, Pasuwalen no tomuk ko kalo niyaro' O hafay namo'i akaka patayla'en i suku a minaang, Oya caka pinangan i suko a demak, Mafana toko dipung, Mitahidan to madawdaw, turik, a tomuk malicay to, O hafay namo manaca ko na'angen i suko, Safaw lima a romi'ad kalikien a patayni i suku a mina'ang, Oya dipung taylasa'an i falangaw mitahidang to tomuk ci Kolas-Mahengheng a mikaykic to lawlaw no niyaro'. Mitengil to suwal ko tomuk, 1911-7-24 Toya romi'ad i turik a kingcasaw Fucinyinselang misa'upo to tomuk, Kapu'i hanira ko tomuk macedeng kamu a misanga to lalan, Ya matuka'ay kamu, Pakatengil sako tomuk ketersa'an kilumot hanra a mi'odut, Taylasa'i papotar kilumot a miseti koya dipung, Tahila kapatayan noya kingcas, Saka mapakohac toko "Madawdaw a demak" . Pakatengil sako tomuk no madawdaw ci likaro, Tayla sa'an ipitilidan patay hannira ko singsi, Misa'upu to finawlan, O madawdaw, O cirarokohay O kaheciday, O pa'ong ong, O torik a paniyaro'an, Tolo su'ot ko kapah a misasi'ayaw to dipung, Itira i pisili'an kanapuka a alo' misa'upo, Satuemanan sa'an milimek olasaka malitemuh no dipung, Lawlawsa'an ira toko makowangay, Ira ko maduka'ay, Ira ko mapatayay, hatila'ay koya demak, Satapang to amilimek ko fafahiyan wawa ato mato'asay tayla i lotok, Toya lilisan no riyal malikutay tono dipung, Awa'ay to ko pakayla'an no finawlan, 1911-8-10 Miliyaw ho mitahidang ci Kolas-Mahenghengan, Amikaykic tosa pipasela'an, Kolas-Mahengheng matu'asayto ci adada'ay, Olasaka adidi han nira mikaykic, O torik madawdaw a niyaro'. Opulong a kuwan pafeli han toko dipung, Ta nonini'an a demak haw i, Spat polo ira falo aromi'ad ko lawlaw no Madawdaw,
S.PHON: == o~u ka rawrawan no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak == jo~u miko~uwan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan i, ɾitəmo~uħən no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u saʡajawaj a taŋasa i pasawaɾi. taɬ~ɮaŋaʡajaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~uja nijaro~uʡ, masinano~utaj ko~u pinaŋan saan ko~u pitapaɾ no~uja ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka ano~u ira ko~u karətəŋaj a tajaɾ tatajaɾən i ʦa ka əʦa mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u paŋʦaħ a pakatajaɾ. patinako~u ħan; o~u pipaɾaɾan to~u ɾaɾan no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj ato~u no~u to~usija, misaŋa to~u kajakaj, mipo~uŋkaŋ, mikarkar to~u minato~u, no~u so~ufitaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, patirəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ, kaħiraħira no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, saka pataŋiʦ saʡan mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kapaħ no~u nijaɾo~u a misako~u~uɾi, saka itiɾasaʡan ipapo~utaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~u kapaħ a matajaɾ, maʡiħiw to~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~uʡ awaʡaj to~uko~u mimawmaħaj, itira a maɾako~u~uɾi mimiŋ ko~u ɾifo~u~un, samisisamaʡanən ɾintaj sako~u ħaɾiŋ, ikaka sato~u ko~u pikaɾiʡaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u misako~u~uɾiʡaj a kapaħ, saka mato~u~uməs to~uko~u ɾaŋiwŋiw no~u faɾo~uʦo~u~u, masaɬ~ɮak to~uko~u miʦo~u~uʡaʡaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ****-*-** to~uja a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ iraʡaj ko~u tataʡaŋaj a kajki no~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, samaʡanən a mifo~u~uʡo~ut ko~uja paŋʦaħ saʡan ko~u kajki naŋra, so~u~uʡəɾin to~u papisaŋaʡən naŋra ko~u kapaħ, to~u kakaħaɬ~ɮaj a katajaɾan, saka pifo~u~uʡo~ut naŋra to~u misako~u~uɾiʡaj a jinʦo~u~umin, taħiɾa piɾifo~u~unan masaʡo~u~upo~u ko~u to~umo~u~uk, itiɾa pisiɾiʡan iɾo~uma no~u to~umo~u~uk, mikajki ko~u to~umo~u~uk, ****-* maħəɾək to~uko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u iɾisiŋ ħaw i, paso~u~uwaɾən no~u to~umo~u~uk ko~u kaɾo~u nijaro~uʡ o~u ħafaj namo~uʡi akaka patajɾaʡən i so~u~uko~u~u a minaaŋ, o~uja ʦaka pinaŋan i so~u~uko~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, mafana to~uko~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, mitaħiɬ~ɮan to~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, to~u~urik, a to~umo~u~uk maɾiʦaj to~u, o~u ħafaj namo~u manaʦa ko~u naʡaŋən i so~u~uko~u, safaw ɾima a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kaɾikiən a patajni i so~u~uko~u~u a minaʡaŋ, o~uja ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ tajɾasaʡan i faɾaŋaw mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u to~umo~u~uk ʦi ko~uɾas-maħəŋħəŋ a mikajkiʦ to~u ɾawɾaw no~u nijaro~uʡ. mitəŋiɾ to~u so~u~uwaɾ ko~u to~umo~u~uk, ****-*-** to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i to~u~urik a kiŋʦasaw fo~u~uʦinjinsəɾaŋ misaʡo~u~upo~u to~u to~umo~u~uk, kapo~u~uʡi ħanira ko~u to~umo~u~uk maʦəɬ~ɮəŋ kamo~u~u a misaŋa to~u ɾaɾan, ja mato~u~ukaʡaj kamo~u~u, pakatəŋiɾ sako~u to~umo~u~uk kətərsaʡan kiɾo~u~umo~ut ħanra a miʡo~uɬ~ɮo~u~ut, tajɾasaʡi papo~utar kiɾo~u~umo~ut a misəti ko~uja ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, taħiɾa kapatajan no~uja kiŋʦas, saka mapako~uħaʦ to~uko~u "maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak" . pakatəŋiɾ sako~u to~umo~u~uk no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ʦi ɾikaro~u, tajɾa saʡan ipitiɾiɬ~ɮan pataj ħannira ko~u siŋsi, misaʡo~u~upo~u~u to~u finawɾan, o~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, o~u ʦiraro~uko~uħaj o~u kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj, o~u paʡo~uŋ o~uŋ, o~u to~urik a panijaro~uʡan, to~uɾo~u so~u~uʡo~ut ko~u kapaħ a misasiʡajaw to~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, itira i pisiɾiʡan kanapo~u~uka a aɾo~uʡ misaʡo~u~upo~u, sato~u~uəmanan saʡan miɾimək o~uɾasaka maɾitəmo~u~uħ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, ɾawɾawsaʡan ira to~uko~u mako~uwaŋaj, ira ko~u maɬ~ɮo~u~ukaʡaj, ira ko~u mapatajaj, ħatiɾaʡaj ko~uja ɬ~ɮəmak, satapaŋ to~u amiɾimək ko~u fafaħijan wawa ato~u mato~uʡasaj tajɾa i ɾo~uto~uk, to~uja ɾiɾisan no~u rijaɾ maɾiko~u~utaj to~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, awaʡaj to~u ko~u pakajɾaʡan no~u finawɾan, ****-*-** miɾijaw ħo~u mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi ko~uɾas-maħəŋħəŋan, amikajkiʦ to~usa pipasəɾaʡan, ko~uɾas-maħəŋħəŋ mato~u~uʡasajto~u ʦi aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡaj, o~uɾasaka aɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi ħan nira mikajkiʦ, o~u to~urik maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a nijaro~uʡ. o~upo~u~uɾo~uŋ a ko~u~uwan pafəɾi ħan to~uko~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ, ta no~uniniʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak ħaw i, spat po~uɾo~u ira faɾo~u aro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾawɾaw no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw,
